CustomField.formula: IF(OR( ISPICKVAL(PS_Task__r.Task_Type__c,'Consult'), ISPICKVAL(PS_Task__r.Task_Type__c,'Consult-Onsite'), ISPICKVAL(PS_Task__r.Task_Type__c,'Consult-Remote'), ISPICKVAL(PS_Task__r.Task_Type__c,'Install'), ISPICKVAL(PS_Task__r.Task_Type__c,'Consult-Onsite-PD'), ISPICKVAL(PS_Task__r.Task_Type__c,'Consult-Remote-PD'), ISPICKVAL(PS_Task__r.Task_Type__c,'Install-PD'), ISPICKVAL(PS_Task__r.Task_Type__c,'RCDM-Install'), ISPICKVAL(PS_Task__r.Task_Type__c,'Resident Engineer'), ISPICKVAL(PS_Task__r.Task_Type__c,'Accelerator'), ISPICKVAL(PS_Task__r.Task_Type__c,'Rubrik University')), true, false)
CustomField.label: Is Billable?
